description: Style NoteMinimalist styling peppered with innovative design details, we love wearable timepieces by QnQ! Styled to perfection, this watch is the perfect accessory staple youve been looking for. Liven up the summer with this watch from QnQ!Product DetailsCase style: Black rectangular case with stainless steel back and metal bezelDial style: Blue dial with silver indicies and handsStrap style: Black strap with a tang claspFeatures: Screw to reset timeWaterproof to 3 BAR, allowing you to use it even when showeringSizeCase diameter: 42 mmCase thickness: 8 mmWarranty provided by Brand Owner / Manufacturer
